title: Waste Management System
shortDescription: A structured waste tracking and categorization platform.
fullDescription: A full-stack waste management platform built to categorize waste, store records, and streamline the process of responsible disposal. Uses React for UI and Node.js + Express for backend logic.

title: Weather Application
fullDescription: A responsive web app that fetches real-time weather data using public APIs. Displays temperature, humidity, wind speed, and visual weather icons with a clean UI.

title: Portfolio Website
fullDescription: A complete animated portfolio with 3D background, modal system, resume viewer, typewriter effect, and responsive design. Built to showcase skills, projects, and interactive UI elements.
